title: 司法部称 Anthropic 不可信，无法接触作战系统
originalTitle: Justice Department Says Anthropic Can't Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
summary: 在 Anthropic 提起诉讼后，政府表示其合法惩罚了该公司，因为 Anthropic 试图限制其 Claude AI 模型被军方使用的方式。司法部称 Anthropic 可能 sabotaging 国家安全系统。
originalSummary: In response to Anthropic's lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military. Defense officials say Anthropic staff might sabotage national security systems.

title: 图灵奖的量子飞跃
originalTitle: A Quantum Leap for the Turing Award
summary: Charles Bennett 和 Gilles Brassard 开创了量子信息理论，现在他们被授予计算机科学的最高荣誉。
originalSummary: Charles Bennett and Gilles Brassard pioneered quantum information theory. Now they've been awarded the highest honor in computer science.

title: Sears AI 聊天机器人电话和短信向全网暴露
originalTitle: Sears Exposed AI Chatbot Phone Calls and Text Chats to Anyone on the Web
summary: 与聊天机器人的客户对话可能包括联系信息和个人细节，使骗子更容易发起网络钓鱼攻击和实施欺诈。
originalSummary: Customer conversations with chatbots can include contact information and personal details that make it easier for scammers to launch phishing attacks and commit fraud.

title: Meta 将于 6 月 15 日关闭 VR 元宇宙 Horizon Worlds
originalTitle: Meta Is Shutting Down Horizon Worlds on Meta Quest on June 15th
summary: Meta 宣布将关闭其 VR 版本的 Horizon Worlds，转而全力投入移动端。这是 Meta 缩减业务的一部分。
originalSummary: Meta announced it will be shifting its strategy to go all-in on mobile for Horizon Worlds. The VR version of the app will be going away on June 15th.

title: 亚利桑那州对预测市场 Kalshi 提起刑事诉讼
originalTitle: Arizona Files Criminal Charges Against Kalshi
summary: 亚利桑那州总检察长指控 Kalshi 非法经营赌博业务。这是针对该预测市场的首起刑事案件。
originalSummary: According to the Arizona attorney general, Kalshi is illegally operating a gambling business. It's the first criminal case against the prediction market.

title: 《堡垒之夜》将于 3 月 19 日全球回归 Google Play

summary: 游戏的新赛季将于同日上线，将以兔八哥为特色。
originalSummary: The game's next big season, which will feature Bugs Bunny, launches the same day.

title: 逆风局的 OpenAI 开启战略收缩
originalTitle: 逆风局的 OpenAI 开启战略收缩
summary: OpenAI 宣布削减电商、浏览器、硬件等副业，重新聚焦代码开发与商业用户领域。公司承认 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 表现优异，是 OpenAI 的警钟。
originalSummary: OpenAI 宣布削减电商、浏览器、硬件等副业，重新聚焦代码开发与商业用户领域。公司承认 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 表现优异，是 OpenAI 的警钟。

originalSummary: Google says Fitbit's AI Coach will offer improved sleep insights and use your medical records for more personalized advice.

originalTitle: Google, Meta and Amazon Join Global Pact to Fight Rising Online Scams
summary: 随着人工智能使诈骗更快、更便宜、更难以检测，公司将分享欺诈情报并协调应对措施。
originalSummary: The companies will share fraud intelligence and coordinate responses as AI makes scams faster, cheaper and harder to detect.

title: World ID 希望在每个 AI 代理上放置独特的人类身份
originalTitle: How World ID Wants to Put a Unique Human Identity on Every AI Agent
summary: 虹膜扫描支持的代币可以帮助阻止特工群体压倒性的在线系统。
originalSummary: Iris-scan backed tokens could help stop agent swarms from overwhelming online systems.

更新

summary: 苹果首次

originalSummary: Apple's first-ever "background security improvement" fixes a vulnerability in its Safari browser running its latest software.

title: Mistral 押注
，进军企业市场
originalTitle: Mistral Bets on 'Build-Your-Own AI' as It Takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the Enterprise
summary: Mistral Forge 允许企业根据自己的数据从头开始训练定制的人工智能模型。
originalSummary: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.

title: Kagi 将其

summary: Kagi 的

originalSummary: Kagi's "Small Web" offers a handpicked collection of more than 30,000 non-commercial, human-authored websites, including personal blogs, webcomics, and independent videos.
